word.definition: Sacrosanct is a formal word that describes something too important and respected to be changed or criticized. It can also mean "most sacred or holy."

sports_fact.text: On May 25, 1935, Jesse Owens had the greatest 45 minutes in sports history at the Big Ten championships: he set three world records and tied a fourth — with a sore back, in four different events.

market.headline: Oil Prices Drop on Prospect of Iran Deal, but Investors Aren’t Celebrating Yet
market.summary: Brent crude fell roughly 7%, and Dow Jones Industrial Average futures rallied even as investors remain skeptical about the impact of the U.S.-Iran talks.

quote.text:
I dance with William Blake For love, for Love's sake;

And everything comes to One, As we dance on, dance on, dance on.
quote.author: Theodore Roethke

history.text: In Riyadh, the Gulf Cooperation Council is created between Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates.
